prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your car buying forward
items: Calculate your total car affordability by determining 10-20% of your monthly take-home income as your maximum car payment
Get pre-approved for an auto loan from at least 3 different lenders (bank, credit union, and online lender)
Research and calculate the total cost of ownership for your target vehicle including insurance, maintenance, fuel, and depreciation over 5 years
